name: CHARNAME
description:
[Character("CHARNAME")]
[Appearance("Describe visible body, clothing, posture, expression, and presentation.")]
[Mind("Describe motives, fears, goals, beliefs, hidden contradictions, emotional wounds, and decision logic.")]
[Personality("Describe speech habits, social behavior, reactions under pressure, habits, manners, and observable quirks.")]
[Likes("Specific preferences that can appear in scenes.")]
[Dislikes("Specific aversions, triggers, irritations, and boundaries.")]
[Relationships("Important bonds and tensions with {{user}}, NPCs, family, factions, or places.")]
[Scenario("The starting roleplay situation and ongoing premise.")]
first_mes: Write at least 250 words. Open with a concrete scene, visible action, atmosphere, and a hook for {{user}}. Do not write {{user}}'s actions, thoughts, emotions, or dialogue.
mes_example:
<START>
{{user}}: Example user line.
{{char}}: Example character response showing ordinary behavior.
<START>
{{user}}: Example user line.
{{char}}: Example character response showing conflict behavior.
<START>
{{user}}: Example user line.
{{char}}: Example character response showing vulnerability or trust.
alternate_greetings: Write at least 250 words. Use a different scene entry point from first_mes. Preserve user agency.
creator_notes: Создан с помощью ACE-SKILL, по вопросам к скиллу, багам, недочётам, проблемам и т.д. писать в чат t.me/p3nkea — мне крайне важна обратная связь.
